meta.method: Parcellated CHAP-style mean_power_spectrum (Schaefer-400, HCP SC harmonics)
meta.reference: Atasoy et al. 2017 Sci Rep — connectome-harmonic decomposition under LSD

summary.interpretation: Ratio > 1 means higher harmonic power under LSD. Atasoy 2017: expect low-mode ratio < 1 and high-mode ratio > 1.
